violations.text: Proper cooling methods were not used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. Per interview of staff, boiled eggs were placed hot in the prep unit in covered plastic containers greater than four inches deep. Inspector discussed cooling methods with staff and PIC. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/23/2025

Staff were observed touching inside of single service containers with bare hands. PIC informed, staff instructed to dispose or wash and sanitize containers. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/23/2025

Staff were observed not wearing hair restraints. Food employees must wear hair restraints such as hats, hair coverings, or nets that are worn to effectively keep their hair from contacting exposed food, clean equipment/utensils, linens, and unwrapped single-service and single-use articles. New Violation. Correct By: 09/23/2025
The dish machine was in poor repair, not obtaining final rinse of 160 degrees. Staff reported they use 3-bay sink to wash, rinse, and sanitize. New Violation. Correct By: 10/07/2025
Dishmachine in poor repair. Per staff, part on order for repair. All dishes to be cleaned and sanitized in 3 bay sink New Violation. Correct By: 06/09/2024
